# Whatweb

```zsh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/PEN-200/Skylark/VM18]
└─$ whatweb -v -a3 --log-verbose WebEnum/whatweb_24680.txt http://$TargetIP:24680       
WhatWeb report for http://192.168.222.226:24680
Status    : 200 OK
Title     : &#x30DB;&#x30FC;&#x30E0; - Umbraco&#x30B5;&#x30F3;&#x30D7;&#x30EB;&#x30B5;&#x30A4;&#x30C8;
IP        : 192.168.222.226
Country   : RESERVED, ZZ

Summary   : HTML5, HTTPServer[Microsoft-IIS/10.0], JQuery[3.1.0], Microsoft-IIS[10.0], Script, Umbraco, X-Powered-By[ASP.NET], X-UA-Compatible[IE=edge]

Detected Plugins:
[ HTML5 ]
        HTML version 5, detected by the doctype declaration 


[ HTTPServer ]
        HTTP server header string. This plugin also attempts to 
        identify the operating system from the server header. 

        String       : Microsoft-IIS/10.0 (from server string)

[ JQuery ]
        A fast, concise, JavaScript that simplifies how to traverse 
        HTML documents, handle events, perform animations, and add 
        AJAX. 

        Version      : 3.1.0
        Website     : http://jquery.com/

[ Microsoft-IIS ]
        Microsoft Internet Information Services (IIS) for Windows 
        Server is a flexible, secure and easy-to-manage Web server 
        for hosting anything on the Web. From media streaming to 
        web application hosting, IIS's scalable and open 
        architecture is ready to handle the most demanding tasks. 

        Version      : 10.0
        Website     : http://www.iis.net/

[ Script ]
        This plugin detects instances of script HTML elements and 
        returns the script language/type. 


[ Umbraco ]
        umbraco is an open source project with roots back to year 
        2000 even though it wasn't released as open source until 
        2004. 

        Google Dorks: (1)
        Website     : http://www.umbraco.org

[ X-Powered-By ]
        X-Powered-By HTTP header 

        String       : ASP.NET (from x-powered-by string)

[ X-UA-Compatible ]
        This plugin retrieves the X-UA-Compatible value from the 
        HTTP header and meta http-equiv tag. - More Info: 
        http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/cc817574.aspx 

        String       : IE=edge

HTTP Headers:
        HTTP/1.1 200 OK
        Transfer-Encoding: chunked
        Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8
        Server: Microsoft-IIS/10.0
        X-Powered-By: ASP.NET
        Date: Sun, 15 Feb 2026 12:39:57 GMT
        Connection: close

```

# Gobuster

errorが多ければ`-t 64`も試す

```zsh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/PEN-200/Skylark/VM18]
└─$ gobuster dir -u http://$TargetIP:24680/ -r -k -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -t 100 -o WebEnum/gobuster_24680.txt -x 'html,htm,txt,sh,php,cgi,asp,aspx,jsp,pl,py,pdf' -s 200,301,302 -b ""
...
```

## umbraco配下のスキャン

- application 以外はどれも同じ出力
```sh
/default              (Status: 200) [Size: 6120]
/.                    (Status: 200) [Size: 6120]
/preview              (Status: 200) [Size: 6120]
/application          (Status: 200) [Size: 434]
/Default              (Status: 200) [Size: 6120]
/Application          (Status: 200) [Size: 434]
/Preview              (Status: 200) [Size: 6120]
/DEFAULT              (Status: 200) [Size: 6120]
/PREVIEW              (Status: 200) [Size: 6120]
```

# Enumeration

## umbraco

- 試行済み認証情報
```sh
ftp_jp:~be<3@6fe1Z:2e8
l.nguyen:ChangeMePlease__XMPPTest
j.jameson:ChangeMePlease__XMPPTest
j.jones:ChangeMePlease__XMPPTest
# 上記ユーザー名：ユーザー名
reynolds:bj1ZzWEmJd870YHMsV+NdfsTuce+zsQRyvb7e5fIgY8= 
l.nguyen@skylark.com:ChangeMePlease__XMPPTest
j.jameson@skylark.com:ChangeMePlease__XMPPTest
j.jones@skylark.com:ChangeMePlease__XMPPTest
reynolds@testing.com:bj1ZzWEmJd870YHMsV+NdfsTuce+zsQRyvb7e5fIgY8= 
umbracoAdmin@tokyo07.jp:umbracoAdmin
umbracoAdmin@tokyo07.jp:ChangeMePlease__XMPPTest
umbracoAdmin@tokyo07.jp:bj1ZzWEmJd870YHMsV+NdfsTuce+zsQRyvb7e5fIgY8=
umbracoAdmin@tokyo07.jp:~be<3@6fe1Z:2e8
```
